title: Bramford to Twinstead Reinforcement Order 2025: correction of errors, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State to make corrections to the Bramford to Twinstead Reinforcement Order 2025.  Date of decision  9 April 2025  Company/location   National Grid Plc1-3 Strand, LondonWC2N 5EH   Type of project  Development consent order for a photovoltaic solar farm / Correction of errors, Planning Act 2008. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
